{{Quote|--Fit for ''action!'' With that healing ''narco-mist'' the medi-droid's spraying, solo-- you won't even ''notice'' those broken ribs from your ''preliminary bout''.|Wheel Security Force officer|<ref name="SWM21" />}}
The '''medi-droids used on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]]''' had base platforms similar to those of [[WED Treadwell repair droid/Legends|Treadwell]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Short, boxy, nonhumanoid models, their abilities included spraying [[narco-mist]] to dull pain and encourage healing. One such droid treated [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] while he fought in [[The Big Game]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 21|''Star Wars'' (1977) 21]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 21}}
